name: Quick Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c Mixed vegetables (frozen peas, carrots, and corn blend)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beef, onion, and garlic in a large saucepan over medium-high heat until the beef is browned, stirring to separate the meat. Drain any excess fat.
2. Puree the tomatoes with their juice using a covered blender or food processor.
3. Add the puréed tomatoes, water, beef bouillon cubes, and pepper to the meat mixture in the saucepan. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
4. Simmer uncovered for 20 minutes.
5. Add the orzo and mixed vegetables to the pot. Continue simmering for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Serve with French bread, if desired.
